name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Super practical small bag. Caviar calfskin, remove the strap to use directly as a handbag. Another bestseller, exuding charm inside and out. The bag is equipped with 16 card slots, can hold however many cards ✨Exquisite craftsmanship 😖Quality worthy of the price. Model=26801 Dimensions 22.5x14x4cm
